---
title: "Posit Gallery Example"
description: "The classic Old Faithful Shiny app as hosted on the official Posit Shiny Gallery, embedded using a traditional iframe."
author: "Brian S. Yandell"
image: "../images/faithful.png"
toc: false
---

[← Back to Demos Gallery](index.qmd)

This section displays the classic Old Faithful Shiny app as hosted on the official Posit Shiny Gallery, using a simple
[iframe](https://www.w3schools.com/TAGS/tag_iframe.asp)
embedding.

```
<iframe src="https://gallery.shinyapps.io/083-front-page"
  style="width: 100%; height: 600px;
  border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```

<div class="shiny-app-frame" style="margin-bottom: 30px;">
  <iframe src="https://gallery.shinyapps.io/083-front-page" style="width: 100%; height: 600px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
</div>
